title: Kenya Signature Safari
description: Explore Kenya’s most iconic and exclusive safari destinations by air including Samburu, Maasai Mara and Lumo Conservancy. Experience luxury camps, rich wildlife encounters, cultural visits and unique activities such as night game drives, bush dinners and scenic flights across Kenya.
highlights: Cultural visits with Maasai, Samburu & Taita communities

itinerary.title: Arrival in Nairobi
itinerary.description: Arrival at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and transfer to your hotel for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Fly to Samburu
itinerary.description: Transfer to Wilson Airport and fly to Samburu National Reserve. Afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Samburu Safari
itinerary.description: Full day game drives in Samburu exploring unique wildlife species.

itinerary.title: Samburu Safari
itinerary.description: Another full day of game drives with optional experiences and sundowners.

itinerary.title: Fly to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Flight to Maasai Mara with en-route game drive and afternoon safari.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Full day game drives in Maasai Mara with Big Five sightings.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Another full day exploring Maasai Mara with optional bush dinner.

itinerary.title: Fly to Lumo Conservancy
itinerary.description: Travel to Lumo Wildlife Conservancy and enjoy evening activities.

itinerary.title: Lumo Conservancy
itinerary.description: Full day game viewing including night game drives and optional activities.

itinerary.title: Lumo Conservancy
itinerary.description: Another full day enjoying wildlife, bush experiences and relaxation.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to airstrip and fly back to Nairobi for departure.

included: Accommodation on bed & breakfast in Nairobi
Full board accommodation in safari camps
Park entrance fees and conservancy fees
accommodation: Four Points by Sheraton Nairobi Airport / Tamarind Tree Hotel – Nairobi (1 night)
Soroi Luxury Migration Camp – Maasai Mara (3 nights)
Soroi Lions Bluff Lodge – Lumo Conservancy (3 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Light clothing for daytime and warm layers for early mornings and evenings. Comfortable safari wear recommended.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals provided in safari camps with a mix of international and local cuisine.

note: Pricing is based on 4 persons traveling together and may vary depending on season and availability.
